title: Internal error with nested virtual interfaces/bind statements

features.name: bind statement inside interface scope
features.description: Code should include a bind statement placed inside an interface definition to bind an interface to a module instance

features.name: virtual interface assignment with hierarchical submodule reference in interface
features.description: Code should include a virtual interface declared and assigned inside an interface using a hierarchical reference to a submodule instance (sub_mod1.sub_if)

features.name: virtual interface passed to class task from interface reference
features.description: Code should include a class task that accepts a virtual interface from an interface and assigns it to a class member virtual interface

features.name: nested interface bind pattern with module instantiation
features.description: Code should include an interface with a bind statement that references a module, where that module is instantiated in a parent module, and the interface contains a virtual interface accessing a bound interface instance through hierarchical reference
